changelog: v2.9.0 - Security: HTML escaping (XSS fix), CSV import error handling, Excel formula injection sanitization; Fix: Wrong dict keys in sales _print_bill (customer_name, paid_amount, unpaid_amount); Fix: Purchase items delete + multi-delete support; Fix: Customer delete; Fix: Extra Income save button visibility; New: Professional HTML receipt; New: One-click auto download & install; New: Grid lines between table sections; New: Dashboard Total Items card clickable
